TaskDescription: Rapid serial visual presentation (RSVP) of training images from the THINGS database. Each image was shown for 100 ms followed by 100 ms blank (200 ms SOA, 5 Hz). Subjects were instructed to maintain fixation and to press a button on random catch (target) trials.
Instructions: Maintain central fixation. On training/test runs, press the button as quickly as possible whenever a catch (target) image appears.
InstitutionalDepartmentName: Department of Education and Psychology, Neural Dynamics of Visual Cognition Lab (Cichy lab)
